steps.title: Use the uncertainty clues
steps.content: Otero does not have a definite idea about when humans might need to live beyond Earth. The next sentence calls the idea a "conjecture," so the blank should describe forming a belief without complete certainty.

steps.title: Match the conjecture word
steps.content: A suggests insisting on something, C suggests disbelief, and D suggests proving something. Those meanings conflict with the uncertainty and conjecture in the passage. The answer is B.
